name: design-studio
description: A virtual design studio that assembles specialist roles for any design task. 19 slash commands covering full design workflows, Figma-native creation, design-to-code, brand kits, A/B variants, design sprints, prototyping, responsive variants, component docs, developer handoff, UX audits, design presentations, site-to-Figma capture, design linting, design-code sync, social media content, campaign planning, and social analytics. Commands: /design, /design-review, /design-system, /figma, /figma-create, /ux-audit, /design-handoff, /figma-responsive, /figma-sync, /design-present, /brand-kit, /component-docs, /figma-prototype, /site-to-figma, /ab-variants, /design-sprint, /social-content, /social-campaign, /social-analytics
